import React,{useState}from"react";import{useTranslation}from"../theme/TranslationContext";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=_ref=>{let{onSwitchToRegister,onBackHome,onForgotPassword,onLoginSuccess}=_ref;const{t}=useTranslation();const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const response=await fetch('/login',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});const data=await response.json();if(response.ok){// Store token
localStorage.setItem('token',data.token);localStorage.setItem('user',JSON.stringify(data.user));alert(data.message);onLoginSuccess();}else{alert(data.message);}}catch(err){alert('Login failed: '+err.message);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"form-title",children:t('loginToKipta')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:t('email'),className:"input-field",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:t('password'),className:"input-field",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value),required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"start-btn",children:t('loginBtn')})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"switch-text",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{onClick:onForgotPassword,children:t('forgotPassword')})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"switch-text",children:t('noAccount')}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"switch-text",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{onClick:onBackHome,children:t('backToHome')})})]});};export default Login;
